subject: [PATCH v4 06/21] mm: swap: add a separate type for physical swap slots

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new type called swp_slot_t to represent physical swap slots on swap devices, separate from the existing swp_entry_t type which represents logical swap entries. The mapping between these two types is initially an identity mapping, but will be used in later patches to dynamically allocate virtual swap slots and associate them with backing stores.
